items.title: Djokovic withdraws from Madrid Open with injury
items.summary: Novak Djokovic, who hasn't competed since the BNP Paribas Open in Indian Wells, has pulled out of the Madrid Open because of a lingering shoulder injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Guardiola: Title 'is over' if Arsenal beat Man City
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has said the title race will be "over" if Manchester City lose to Arsenal this weekend.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: KKR bat with Seifert in for Allen against unchanged GT
items.summary: KKR made a big change in their top order in a bid to turn around their IPL 2026
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
